zh.lifeSummary: 當Gaucher III de CHATILLON於1166年5月16日出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷維特時，他的父親Guy De Châtillon II24歲，母親Alix de Dreux10歲。他於1196年5月30日與Elisabeth de SAINT-POL在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1219年9月7日在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gaucher III de CHATILLON于1166年5月16日出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷維特时，他的父亲Guy De Châtillon II24岁，母亲Alix de Dreux10岁。他于1196年5月30日与Elisabeth de SAINT-POL在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1219年9月7日在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gaucher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Armand, Francoise, Jacques, Laurette, Lucien, Philippe.
from the ancient Germanic personal name Walhari, composed of the elements walh ‘stranger’ and hari ‘army’.

variants.name: Coetzee
meanings: Afrikaans: probably an altered form of Dutch Goetzee, which is of French Huguenot origin, probably from Gaucher . Alternatively, Coetzee may be an altered form of Dutch Kuzee, a habitational name recorded in the 16th century as Cudsee and Cutsee, from a toponym located in Zeeland, which may be interpreted as Cut's-see ‘watercourse of Cudo’.
History: Dirk Coetzee, born in Kampen in the Netherlands around 1655, died in Cape Town in 1725.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Gaucher III de CHATILLON was born on 16 May 1166, in Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Guy De Châtillon II, was 24 and his mother, Alix de Dreux, was 10. He married Elisabeth de SAINT-POL on 30 May 1196, in Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 7 September 1219, in Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gaucher III de CHATILLON est né le 16 mai 1166, à Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Guy De Châtillon II, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Alix de Dreux, avait 10 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth de SAINT-POL le 30 mai 1196, à Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 7 septembre 1219, à Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gaucher III de CHATILLON am 16. Mai 1166 in Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guy De Châtillon II 24 und seine Mutter Alix de Dreux 10. Er hat am 30. Mai 1196 in Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Elisabeth de SAINT-POL geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 7. September 1219 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gaucher III de CHATILLON è nato il il 16 maggio 1166 nel Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Guy De Châtillon II, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Alix de Dreux, aveva 10 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth de SAINT-POL il 30 maggio 1196, nel Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 7 settembre 1219, nel Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gaucher III de CHATILLONが1166年5月16日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスフルeベントで生まれた時，父Guy De Châtillon IIは24歳，母Alix de Dreuxは10歳であった。1196年5月30日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスサイント-プオル-スル-テルノイゼでElisabeth de SAINT-POLと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1219年9月7日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスサイント-プオル-スル-テルノイゼで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gaucher III de CHATILLON(이)가 1166년 5월 16일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 프e븐트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy De Châtillon II(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Alix de Dreux(은)는 10세였다. 그는 1196년 5월 30일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 세인트-포-수-터노이스에서 Elisabeth de SAINT-POL(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1219년 9월 7일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 세인트-포-수-터노이스에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.16 MAY 1166–7 SEP 1219: 16 de maio de 1166–7 de setembro de 1219
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gaucher III de CHATILLON nasceu em 16 de maio de 1166, em Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Guy De Châtillon II, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Alix de Dreux, tinha 10 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth de SAINT-POL em 30 de maio de 1196, em Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de setembro de 1219, em Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gaucher III de CHATILLON родился 16 мая 1166 г. в местности фрeвент, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Guy De Châtillon II было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Alix de Dreux, 10. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth de SAINT-POL 30 мая 1196 г. в местности сеинт-пол-сур-тирноис, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 7 сентября 1219 г. в местности сеинт-пол-сур-тирноис, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 53 лет.

es.16 MAY 1166–7 SEP 1219: 16 de mayo de 1166–7 de septiembre de 1219
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gaucher III de CHATILLON nació el 16 de mayo de 1166, en Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Guy De Châtillon II, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Alix de Dreux, tenía 10 años. Se casó con Elisabeth de SAINT-POL el 30 de mayo de 1196, en Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 7 de septiembre de 1219, en Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 53 años.
